description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Dated: 1 Kislev 1[4]12 Seleucid (1100 CE). Signed by Ḥillel b. ʿEli and Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Husband: Shela b. Yehuda. Wife: [...] bt. Avraham. (Information from Goitein's index card.). This document is significant from a chronological perspective given that it is one of the earliest to bear the signature of the prolific scribe Ḥalfon b. Menashshe.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12 מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
